hero.title: Movement. Balance | Control.
hero.subtitle: Discover Pilates Reformer – a workout that redefines your posture and balances your body.

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.quote: We believe in movement as a form of balance.
philosophy.desc: In a hurried world, we choose to slow down and return to the essentials — to control, alignment, and awareness. For us, Pilates is not just a workout, but a practice through which the body rediscovers its natural balance.
philosophy.desc2: Aluna is a space where you learn to move correctly and feel good in your own body — not just now, but for the long term.

classes_teaser.title: Our Experience
classes_teaser.subtitle: Find the perfect class to match your journey, from foundational techniques to advanced flows.

reformer_flow.title: Reformer Flow
reformer_flow.desc: A rhythmic, flowing class focusing on seamless transitions.

sculpt_tone.title: Sculpt & Tone
sculpt_tone.desc: Targeted resistance training to build definition and endurance.

stretch_restore.title: Stretch & Restore
stretch_restore.desc: Focus on flexibility, breath, and releasing tension.

spotlight.title: Guided by Experts
spotlight.desc: Our certified instructors bring years of experience and a passion for personalized guidance. We focus on form, alignment, and individual progression.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.desc: Aluna Reformer Studio was born from our desire to bring a different approach to the world of movement: one where precision, posture, and correct execution are essential.

split.p1: Aluna Reformer Studio was born from our desire to bring a different approach to the world of movement: one where precision, posture, and correct execution are essential.
split.p2: As dental practitioners, we understand how important correct execution is, the role of prevention, and the impact that details have on health and quality of life. We've integrated this medical perspective into the Aluna concept, where every movement is guided and performed with attention and intention.
split.p3: We believe that movement done correctly is not just about aesthetics, but about functionality, alignment, and prevention. That's why each session is carefully designed in a controlled setting, with the focus on posture, technique, and body awareness.
split.p4: Aluna is a boutique studio where quality comes first — we work on an individual or semi-private basis, to give each person the attention and guidance they need.

closing.line1: For us, Pilates is not just a workout.
closing.line2: It is a form of care for your own body, for the long term.

philosophy.p2: Aluna is a space where you learn to move correctly and feel good in your own body — not just now, but for the long term.

instructors.title: Our Instructors
instructors.bio: Specializes in rehabilitation and athletic conditioning. Brings 10+ years of movement experience.

classes.title: Class Offerings
classes.subtitle: Small group reformer classes designed to lengthen, strengthen, and align.

foundations.title: Reformer Foundations
foundations.desc: The perfect starting point. Focus on equipment safety, basic pilates principles, and building core stability.

signature.title: Signature Flow
signature.desc: Our signature open-level class. A rhythmic, full-body workout that seamlessly transitions between exercises.

dynamic.title: Dynamic Sculpt
dynamic.desc: A higher intensity class incorporating props (weights, bands, balls) to challenge stability and build lean muscle.

jumpboard.title: Jumpboard Cardio
jumpboard.desc: Low-impact cardio using the jumpboard attachment. Raises heart rate while maintaining pilates alignment.

footer.tagline: A sanctuary for reformative movement. Find your balance, strength, and grace in our refined studio space.

newsletter.desc: Subscribe to receive updates and wellness tips.

schedule.headline: Movement. Balance | Control.
schedule.quote: A space designed for the soul to breathe and the body to find its center.

pricing.headline: Pricing List
pricing.subtitle: Elevate your practice in our serene boutique environment. Choose from our curated session packages designed for progress and restoration.

offer.title: 10% Discount in Your First Month
offer.desc: First session is free. Join during our opening month and enjoy 10% off all packages.

method.title: The Aluna Method
method.desc: Our approach blends classical reformer techniques with contemporary functional movement, focusing on alignment, breath, and mindful exertion within a curated sanctuary.

cookie_banner.message: We use cookies to remember your language preference and your consent choice. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.

cookie_policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie_policy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, which cookies Aluna Reformer Studio uses on this website, and what your rights are regarding them.
cookie_policy.what_body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet, or phone) when you visit a website. They allow the site to remember certain information about your visit, such as your preferred language.
cookie_policy.we_use_intro: This website uses only essential cookies. We do not use advertising, analytics, or any third-party tracking cookies.

cookies.name: i18next
cookies.purpose: Remembers your preferred language (Romanian or English) so you don't have to re-select it on each visit.

cookies.name: cookie_consent
cookies.purpose: Records whether you have accepted or declined this cookie notice, so we do not display it on every visit.

cookie_policy.rights_body: Under Romanian law and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can withdraw your consent at any time by clearing your browser's local storage or by contacting us directly.
cookie_policy.manage_body: Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or delete existing ones through their settings. Please note that disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of this website (e.g., your language preference will not be saved).
cookie_policy.contact_body: If you have any questions about this Cookie Policy, please contact us at:

validation.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number

states.success_message: We've received your inquiry and will be in touch within 24 hours.
states.error_message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
